item.title: Finding Two Issues on a BMW 535i
item.description: A diagnostic inspection of a BMW 535i revealing two key issues. Step-by-step troubleshooting, system checks, and repair insights on a modern luxury vehicle.

item.title: Ford 5.4 V8 Engine Tear-Down
item.description: A detailed tear-down of a Ford 5.4 V8 engine. Step-by-step disassembly, inspection of internal components, and insights into wear and mechanical condition.

item.title: Why Some Cars Don’t Last Long
item.description: A breakdown of common reasons vehicles wear out early. Covering maintenance habits, mechanical stress, and key factors that affect long-term car reliability.

item.title: Fixing a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit
item.description: A repair and diagnostic process on a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit. Step-by-step troubleshooting, system checks, and fixes to restore proper vehicle performance.

item.title: How a Clutch Fails in a Car
item.description: A simple breakdown of how and why a car clutch can fail. Covering wear, driving habits, and mechanical issues that lead to slipping, noise, or loss of engagement.

item.description: A breakdown of Audi reliability and common issues seen in real-world use. Covering maintenance needs, weak points, and what to expect from long-term ownership.
